title: Discussion Post: Climate Change Policy
description: Evaluate the most effective policy approaches to addressing climate change.
prompt_text: In 2–3 paragraphs, evaluate what you consider the most effective policy approaches to addressing climate change. Support your argument with specific examples and acknowledge at least one counterargument or limitation.
constraints: Discuss at least two distinct policy approaches
Include at least one specific real-world example

expert_answers.answer: Effective climate policy requires a combination of market mechanisms and regulatory frameworks. Carbon pricing — through a carbon tax or cap-and-trade — creates economic incentives to reduce emissions across all sectors. Renewable energy incentives, such as investment tax credits and feed-in tariffs, accelerate the energy transition by making clean technology financially viable. International cooperation through agreements like the Paris Accord is essential because emissions are borderless; however, enforcement remains a significant weakness. A key limitation of market-based approaches is that without adequate redistribution, they can disproportionately burden lower-income households.
